package.name: semantic_mapping
package.description: The ROS shell over semantic_store. Phase 1: consumes the DetectionArray stream from semantic_perception, fuses detections into a spatial semantic map, and on request runs a batch enrichment pass (VLM description + image embedding + region clustering) and persists the map. Phase 2: loads a saved map and serves QuerySemanticMap, publishing the map as SemanticObjectArray + RViz markers.
